result.stdout:
Created by Automate The Planet Ltd.
http://bellatrix.solutions
result.stderr:
bellatrixcloudtestrunner 1.0.23.0
Automate The Planet Ltd. 2020

  --results                    Required. The path to the file where all results
                               will be stored.

  -l, --library                Required. The path to the tests' library file.

  -t, --runTimeout             The time in minutes after which the test run will
                               be stopped. Default = 120 minutes.

  --testTimeout                The time in minutes after which the test will be
                               stopped. Default = 5 minutes.

  -f, --filter                 The filter that will be applied to the whole set
                               of tests.

  -m, --maxCount               Specifies the maximum count of parallel test run
                               processes. The default one is equal to the
                               machines' CPU cores count.

  --timeBased                  Specifies whether the tests will be distributed
                               based on previous execution times.

  --retries                    How many times the failed tests will be retried.

  --threshold                  If the percentage of the failed tests is bigger
                               than the specified threshold %, no next reruns
                               will be performed.

  --companyName                Required. Needed to process your results
                               correctly.

  --projectName                Needed to process your results correctly.

  --licenseKey                 Required. Your BELLATRIX Cloud Runner license
                               key.

  --testRunName                Required. Needed to create the correct statistics
                               for your runs.

  --additionalData             An info that will be added to your test run
                               notification such as URLs to CI runs and results.

  --autoAnalysis               Mark whether to perform ML test failure analysis.

  --reportPortalProject        The name of the Report Portal project where the
                               test results will be uploaded.

  --reportPortalAccessToken    The Report Portal access token used for
                               authentication.

  --reportPortalUrl            The Report Portal instance URL.

  --reportPortalLaunchName     The name of the launches imported to Report
                               Portal.

  --testRun                    Specifies that this is a test run and no results
                               should be published.

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.

commands.payload:
bellatrixcloudtestrunner 1.0.23.0
Automate The Planet Ltd. 2020

  --results                    Required. The path to the file where all results
                               will be stored.

  -l, --library                Required. The path to the tests' library file.

  -t, --runTimeout             The time in minutes after which the test run will
                               be stopped. Default = 120 minutes.

  --testTimeout                The time in minutes after which the test will be
                               stopped. Default = 5 minutes.

  -f, --filter                 The filter that will be applied to the whole set
                               of tests.

  -m, --maxCount               Specifies the maximum count of parallel test run
                               processes. The default one is equal to the
                               machines' CPU cores count.

  --timeBased                  Specifies whether the tests will be distributed
                               based on previous execution times.

  --retries                    How many times the failed tests will be retried.

  --threshold                  If the percentage of the failed tests is bigger
                               than the specified threshold %, no next reruns
                               will be performed.

  --companyName                Required. Needed to process your results
                               correctly.

  --projectName                Needed to process your results correctly.

  --licenseKey                 Required. Your BELLATRIX Cloud Runner license
                               key.

  --testRunName                Required. Needed to create the correct statistics
                               for your runs.

  --additionalData             An info that will be added to your test run
                               notification such as URLs to CI runs and results.

  --autoAnalysis               Mark whether to perform ML test failure analysis.

  --reportPortalProject        The name of the Report Portal project where the
                               test results will be uploaded.

  --reportPortalAccessToken    The Report Portal access token used for
                               authentication.

  --reportPortalUrl            The Report Portal instance URL.

  --reportPortalLaunchName     The name of the launches imported to Report
                               Portal.

  --testRun                    Specifies that this is a test run and no results
                               should be published.

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.

staticCommands.name: runner
staticCommands.description: Executes Meissa in --runner mode. You need to pass all native runner arguments using the argument nativeRunnerArguments.
